    </p>

        <wje-button color="success">Success</wje-button>

      </wje-button-group>

        <wje-button color="warning">Warning</wje-button>
      </wje-button-group>

        <wje-button color="neutral">Neutral</wje-button>
        <wje-button color="neutral">Neutral</wje-button>
